## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are atomic and follow `<type>(<scope>): <subject>`
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] New runtime deps justified in this PR description (or none added)
- [ ] Scorer weight changes include a before/after benchmark (or N/A)
- [ ] No API keys, private keys, or personal wallet addresses committed
